name: prepare_handover
description: Prepare a session handover. Returns a /pickup command that the user can send in any IM channel connected to VibeAround to resume the session there.

session_id.description: Your current session ID. If omitted, VibeAround will try to find the most recent session for the given cwd.

cwd.description: Absolute path to your current working directory / project workspace.

agent_kind.description: Your agent type (e.g. claude, gemini, codex).

name: register_workspace
description: Register a project workspace directory in VibeAround. Required before handover if the workspace is not already registered.

cwd.description: Absolute path to the project workspace directory to register.

name.description: Optional human-readable name for the workspace.

name: dispatch_task
description: Dispatch a task to a worker agent on a project workspace.

workspace.description: Absolute path to the project workspace directory.

message.description: The task or question for the worker agent
